captions.p5_grounded:
A close-up of a dark bowl contains a light brown broth with white rice, long white bean sprouts, yellow bean sprouts, sliced green onions, and small red chili pieces, with a metal spoon lifting some of the food.  

Search keywords: soup, rice, bean sprouts, green onions, chili peppers, metal spoon, dark bowl

A black oval pan holds a savory dish with glossy red sauce, bean sprouts (white stems with yellow tips), pieces of meat, and small yellow elements, resting on a metal surface near a yellow metal structure and a red plastic chair. In the background, a container displays visible Korean text.  

Search keywords: black oval pan, red sauce, bean sprouts, yellow tips, pieces of meat, small yellow elements, metal surface, yellow metal structure, red plastic chair, Korean text container

A bubbling pot contains slices of pork belly, bean sprouts, green vegetables, and a reddish-orange spicy broth, all cooking in a metal pan.  
Search keywords: bubbling pot, pork belly slices, bean sprouts, green vegetables, reddish-orange broth, metal cooking pan

A black bowl holds stacked raw salmon slices topped with bright orange fish roe, surrounded by fresh green microgreens, a dollop of green wasabi, and shredded white vegetables, all placed on a wooden table with a person holding chopsticks and a glass of light-colored drink visible in the background.  

Search keywords: salmon sashimi, fish roe, microgreens, wasabi, shredded white vegetables, black bowl, wooden table, chopsticks, glass of drink

Close-up of raw pork belly chunks on a metal grill over glowing charcoal coals, with small white bowls holding red and light-colored sauces arranged nearby.  
Search keywords: raw pork belly, grill, charcoal, sauce bowls, cooking.

A dark cast iron skillet holds a serving of tender, shredded roasted chicken with a glossy, browned exterior, accompanied by fluffy white rice beneath it; steam rises from the hot dish.  

Search keywords: roasted chicken, white rice, cast iron skillet, glossy chicken, steam, shredded chicken

An image displayed on a computer monitor features a person with short brown hair wearing a white top, positioned against a blurred background of green foliage and red flowers. The monitor shows Adobe Photoshop interface elements, including vertical rulers and file name text on the left side.  

Search keywords: computer screen photo, short brown hair, white top, blurred outdoor background, green plants, red flowers, Adobe Photoshop interface

The photo depicts an upside-down view of a person with curly dark hair wearing black-framed glasses and a light blue shirt with partially visible text on the collar, positioned against a backdrop of a large body of water bordered by hilly terrain with mixed green and brown vegetation and several white wind turbines near the water’s edge. Bright daylight illuminates the outdoor scene.  

Search keywords: upside-down photo, person with curly dark hair, black-framed glasses, light blue shirt (partial text "KON"), large body of water, hilly terrain with mixed green and brown vegetation, white wind turbines, daytime outdoor landscape

Two people are posing closely together in a selfie, both making peace signs with their hands. The person on the left wears dark clothing and glasses, while the person on the right wears a light blue shirt with a colorful floral collar.  

Search keywords: people, selfie, peace sign, glasses, light blue shirt, floral collar, dark background

Six people pose together on a grassy field under a clear blue sky, with the sun shining brightly on the left and creating visible lens flares; they wear casual outdoor clothing like jackets, hats, and sneakers, with one person seated on the ground and others standing.  

Search keywords: group photo, outdoor group, grassy field, sunny day, clear blue sky, lens flares, casual outdoor attire (jackets, hats, sneakers), standing and seated individuals, distant building with repeated small structures.

A person rides a dark horse with white markings across a dry, rocky forest floor surrounded by tall, slender trees with few leaves under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The landscape features sparse grass, scattered rocks, and cut tree stumps.  

Search keywords: person riding horse, tall leafless trees, dry grassy ground, blue sky with clouds, dark horse with white markings, rider wearing dark clothing and cap, rocky terrain

The photo shows a coastal scene with large concrete tetrapods forming a breakwater along the shore, a person in a white shirt standing on them facing the calm, dark blue ocean, and distant rocky outcrops visible in the water under an overcast sky.  

Search keywords: coastal scene, concrete tetrapods, ocean, person in white shirt, rocky outcrops, breakwater

The image shows a misty mountain landscape with dense green vegetation in the foreground, including bushes with small pink flowers, while layered hills fade into the fog under an overcast sky with subtle pink tones near the horizon.  

Search keywords: misty mountain landscape, green vegetation, pink flowers, hazy mountains, overcast sky, pink horizon

The photo captures a multi-lane urban road with several vehicles—including silver, red, and black cars—traveling under a partly cloudy sky. Lush green trees line the road, while distant tall buildings are visible, including a white structure marked "101" and a dome-shaped building.  

Search keywords: urban road, multi-lane highway, vehicles, green trees, tall buildings, "101" building, dome-shaped building, traffic signs, partly cloudy sky, cityscape

A paved road with white lane markings stretches into the distance under a partly cloudy sky with soft sunlight near the horizon, flanked by trees and tall streetlights. A truck is visible on the left side of the road.  

Search keywords: road, white lane markings, trees, streetlights, partly cloudy sky, low sunlight, truck, horizon, paved

Two silhouetted people walk along a modern pedestrian bridge with repeating rectangular structural frames, shaded on one side, under a partly cloudy blue sky. Distant city buildings and greenery are visible beyond the bridge’s metal railings.  

Search keywords: pedestrian bridge, rectangular frame structures, shaded walkway, people walking, blue sky, clouds, city buildings, greenery, metal railings

A computer monitor displays a database software interface with a data grid containing Korean text labels (e.g., "일반국도", "지방도") and numerical rows, alongside toolbars featuring icons for file operations and data management. A white gaming controller with a visible "6" button is partially visible in the lower right corner of the photo.  

Search keywords: computer monitor, database software interface, Korean text labels, data grid, toolbars, Excel icon, PDF icon, gaming controller, "6" button

This is a screenshot of a Windows command prompt window showing a continuous ping test to www.google.com, displaying multiple response times from the IP address 173.194.38.84 along with Korean text indicating time intervals and TTL values. The screen features the Windows version 6.1.7601 and copyright notice at the top.  

Search keywords: Windows command prompt, ping test results, computer screen screenshot, Windows Version 6.1.7601, www.google.com, 173.194.38.84, Korean text, response times, TTL=52.

A laptop screen displays the CentOS 6 boot logo with a spinning loader icon, and the device is an LG model in a dimly lit setting.  
Search keywords: laptop, CentOS 6, LG, boot screen, loading spinner

A computer monitor displays a Korean-language webpage for an A/S (after-sales service) center, detailing business hours (e.g., weekdays 10:00–19:00), contact information (phone: 02-711-7906-7, FAX: 02-716-7907), address (Seoul Yongsan-gu), and service offerings like camera repair. The screen includes a taskbar with visible application icons.  

Search keywords: computer monitor screenshot, Korean service center webpage, A/S center information, business hours 10:00–19:00, contact phone 02-711-7906-7, Seoul Yongsan-gu address, DOOT TO DOOT service, taskbar application icons.

A computer monitor displays a Linux terminal with Java-related error logs, shell commands like "ps -ef | grep app.file", and Java version details (1.6.0.02), while a white gaming controller with a visible "9" button appears partially in the lower portion of the frame.  

Search keywords: computer monitor, terminal output, Java stack trace, shell command ps -ef grep app.file, Java 1.6.0.02, gaming controller with number 9

A narrow urban street under a black mesh canopy with blue and green stripes, featuring red plastic chairs and a small table on the left, a man pushing a shopping cart on the right, and low-rise buildings with Korean-language signs (including “정파사” and “도마전파사”) and utility poles with crisscrossing overhead wires, under an overcast sky.  

Search keywords: narrow street, black mesh canopy (blue/green stripes), red plastic chairs, small table, shopping cart, Korean signs (정파사, 도마전파사), utility poles, overhead wires, asphalt road, overcast sky

An open cardboard box rests on a wooden surface, filled with multiple product boxes that prominently display the brand name "reskin" and labels like "TS SOAP", along with a large box featuring a black - and - white portrait of a person and text reading "Mild Hair Loss Shampoo". Some boxes also show visible text such as "reskin" and "TS SOAP" on their packaging.  

Search keywords: cardboard box, open box, wooden floor, product packaging, reskin brand, TS SOAP, black - and - white portrait, hair loss shampoo, multiple boxes, product boxes.

A green glass bottle with a label reading "JINRO GOLD" and Korean text is prominently placed on a table, surrounded by white disposable cups (one displaying "Have a Good Time" text), a clear plastic bottle with a blue cap, and other indistinct objects. The background includes blurred people in a casual indoor setting.  

Search keywords: green glass bottle, JINRO GOLD label, Korean text, white disposable cups, "Have a Good Time" text, blue-capped plastic bottle, table setting

A refrigerator door shelf holds various bottles, including green glass containers with white labels, a bottle with a yellow cap, and a bottle wrapped in cloth with handwritten text. The right section features more bottles with green glass, a red-capped container, and dark-colored bottles.  

Search keywords: refrigerator door shelf, green glass bottles, yellow cap, cloth-wrapped bottle, Korean text labels, red cap bottle, dark-colored bottles, plastic divider.

A store shelf displays multiple snack packages, including two boxes of Italiala Sfoglie pastries—one labeled "20 puff pastry with hazelnut cream" (featuring hazelnut images) and another "20 puff pastry with strawberry cream" (featuring strawberry images), both marked "37% cream" and "NET WT. 3.85 OZ (110g)", surrounded by other products like DeKo's Cremes and MarketO cookies, with Korean price stickers showing "2,000 원" attached to the packages.  

Search keywords: Sfoglie pastries, Italiala, hazelnut cream puff pastry, strawberry cream puff pastry, 3.85 oz (110g), 20 puff pastry, Korean price stickers (2,000 won), DeKo's Cremes, MarketO cookies, store snack shelf.
